overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunny waterfront promenade, transitioning through an open plaza into a covered walkway with distinctive orange arched architecture. The scene features modern glass buildings, palm trees, scattered pedestrians, and futuristic urban design elements.

events.description: character turns left toward the plaza entrance, leaving the main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk, passing by palm trees and parked cars

notable_agents.action: child walking alongside the player character before stopping

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with reflective glass facade and balconies
tall palm trees lining the waterfront edge
black metal railing separating walkway from water
futuristic vehicles parked along the street side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny waterfront promenade with a modern glass building on the right and palm trees lining the water's edge on the left. A child walks briefly alongside before the character turns left toward a plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with modern canopy structure

events.description: exits waterfront sidewalk and enters open plaza area
approaching the distinctive orange arched canopy structure

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main path and walking across the open plaza toward the covered walkway

entered.detail: futuristic orange arched canopy with transparent roof panels spanning across the plaza
deciduous trees planted in raised concrete beds

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide open plaza, leaving the waterfront behind. The distinctive orange arched canopy structure becomes visible in the distance as the character walks across the paved plaza with scattered trees and planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertisements

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the orange canopy structure
passing digital advertisement boards and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing benches and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench using a device

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement screen displaying purple promotional content
modern concrete seating blocks along the walkway edge
small colorful vendor booth visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the sweeping orange canopy that casts geometric shadows on the ground, the character moves through the sheltered walkway. Digital billboards and concrete benches line the path, with a few pedestrians visible ahead and someone seated on a bench to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into a sheltered urban walkway defined by bold geometric architecture. It begins with the character walking past a modern glass building and palm trees along the water's edge, briefly accompanied by a child before turning left toward a plaza entrance. As the character leaves the waterfront behind, the scene opens into a wide paved plaza where a distinctive orange arched canopy emerges in the distance. The camera then follows the character across the open space and beneath the sweeping orange structure, shifting from direct sunlight into a sheltered environment of geometric shadows. Finally, the path leads through the covered walkway past digital billboards and concrete benches where scattered pedestrians linger.
